inputs.mood_pattern: anxiety -> equanimity (gradual decline over the week)
inputs.dharmic_challenge: Stopping work at the same hour every night
inputs.pattern_noticed: I am calmer on days I cook dinner.
inputs.sankalpa: Honour the body's bedtime as a daily vow.

inputs.mood_pattern: sadness dominant; brief moments of acceptance on day 4
inputs.sankalpa: Sit with one memory of my father each morning before the news.

inputs.dharmic_challenge: Saying the difficult thing to my manager
inputs.pattern_noticed: Honesty costs me sleep but returns me energy.
inputs.sankalpa: Speak the truth before the second cup of tea.

inputs.dharmic_challenge: Returning to the page after a missed day
inputs.pattern_noticed: The longer I avoid, the larger the resistance.
inputs.sankalpa: Five minutes of honest writing every day, even if it is bad.

inputs.dharmic_challenge: Caring for everyone without erasing myself
inputs.pattern_noticed: I give until I resent it.
inputs.sankalpa: Each act of service, ask: would I want this for myself?
